report_name: ENISA Updates Framework for National Cybersecurity Assessment

identities.name: European Union Agency for Cybersecurity (ENISA)
identities.description: The European Union Agency for Cybersecurity, which released version 2.0 of the National Capabilities Assessment Framework (NCAF) to help EU member states assess their cybersecurity maturity in alignment with the NIS2 Directive.

identities.name: European Union
identities.description: The political and economic union of 27 member states for which the NCAF 2.0 framework is designed to improve cybersecurity resilience and ensure a high common level of cybersecurity as mandated by the NIS2 Directive.

identities.name: EU Member States
identities.description: The primary users of the NCAF 2.0 framework, comprising the national authorities of the 27 EU countries responsible for implementing National Cybersecurity Strategies (NCSS) and complying with the NIS2 Directive.
